data.title: Trump ends trade talks with Canada after Ontario's ad criticizing tariffs. Kevin O'Leary advises to focus on long-term opportunities in Canada.
data.description: Business mogul and "Shark Tank" investor Kevin O'Leary advised Americans to shift their attention to the long-term economic prospects in Canada amidst the collapse of trade talks, which he deemed as inconsequential noise. President Donald Trump abruptly ended all trade discussions with Canada following a controversial ad from Ontario that criticized U.S. tariffs and quoted Ronald Reagan stating that tariffs negatively impact all Americans. Trump labeled the ad as deceitful and accused Canada of attempting to sway U.S. Supreme Court decisions. Through a post on Truth Social, he declared the termination of all trade negotiations with Canada. In contrast, O'Leary emphasized the importance of focusing on Canada's economic foundation despite the temporary disruptions caused by tariffs, trade disputes, and political rhetoric. The Canadian entrepreneur highlighted the need to concentrate on the broader economic outlook rather than getting caught up in the immediate noise surrounding trade relations between the two countries.

data.title: openvela's Global Developer Conference ended, key milestone in AIoT ecosystem, founder Gregory Nutt joins; held in Costa Rica on Oct. 25, 2025.
data.description: In San José, Costa Rica on October 25, 2025, the inaugural Global Developer Conference hosted by openvela concluded triumphantly. This event signifies a significant achievement in the open-source AIoT domain. openvela, an open-source AIoT operating system developed by Xiaomi using NuttX as its foundation, operates under the Apache 2 license.

data.title: 2025 Chery International User Summit in Wuhu, China discusses shift to ecosystem co-creation amid carbon neutrality goals.
data.description: In WUHU, China on October 25, 2025, it was reported that the automotive industry is experiencing a significant transformation as the world shifts towards carbon neutrality and intelligent technologies reshape various sectors. This shift in focus is moving the industry away from traditional hardware-driven competition towards collaborative ecosystem development. This shift marks a historic moment as industries adapt to the changing global landscape.

data.title: DeLeion Capital introduces a new growth protocol amid market volatility. Launches asset custody & investment service.
data.description: In Miami on October 25, 2025, amidst heightened market volatility and erratic fluctuations in key assets, DeLeion Capital has announced the introduction of its new asset custody and investment service. This service aims to provide investors with a secure platform to manage their assets during these uncertain times. The launch comes at a crucial moment when investors are seeking stability and reliability in their investments.

data.title: Ontario will pause ad featuring Ronald Reagan criticizing tariffs after airing it during the first two World Series games.
data.description: The provincial government of Ontario, Canada, will temporarily halt a TV ad featuring former U.S. President Ronald Reagan criticizing tariffs, after airing it during the initial two World Series games this weekend. Ontario Premier Doug Ford stated that the ad aimed to spark a conversation about the type of economy Americans wish to create and the impact of tariffs on businesses and workers. Ford mentioned that they achieved their goal of reaching a substantial U.S. audience. The decision to pause the ad was made for Monday. Ford instructed his team to continue running the ad throughout the weekend to ensure it aired during the first two World Series games. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ripple's purchase of Hidden Road elevates its fintech services for clients, strengthening RLUSD stablecoin.
data.description: Ripple has successfully acquired Hidden Road in a strategic maneuver to enhance its fintech offerings tailored for institutional clients. This acquisition is projected to amplify the utility and accessibility of its RLUSD stablecoin.

data.title: Hainan Media Tour took journalists from 20+ outlets including The Christian Science Monitor and Czech Television, opening new opportunities.
data.description: In Haikou, China on October 24, 2025, the Hainan International Media Center published a report about the Hainan Media Tour held from October 15 to 17. The tour hosted journalists from more than 20 domestic and international media organizations, such as The Christian Science Monitor, Czech Television, China Arab TV, and Xinhua.

data.title: Former Louisiana AG initiates investigation into Fortrea Holdings. KSF probes officers and directors of FTRE. Charles C. Foti leading.
data.description: A former Louisiana Attorney General, Charles C. Foti, Jr., now a partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, has disclosed an investigation by the firm into Fortrea Holdings, Inc. (NasdaqGS: FTRE). The investigation began in June 2025.

data.title: Uptiq introduces Qore at Money20/20, an AI platform for financial services to create AI applications quickly.
data.description: In Las Vegas, Uptiq.ai, a prominent AI infrastructure provider for Financial Services, revealed the launch of Uptiq Qore at Money20/20 USA occurring from October 26 to 29. This innovative platform empowers financial institutions to develop advanced AI applications and agents rapidly, within weeks rather than months. Qore introduces a pivotal change in the way Financial Services approach innovation, eliminating the need for costly consultants and prolonged development periods. Business users can now easily envision and actualize AI solutions.

data.title: Bank of England investigates data-driven lending for AI, fears a bubble like dot-com crash due to surge in data center loans.
data.description: The Bank of England has expressed concerns over the increasing trend of financiers providing loans to data centers, fearing it could lead to an artificial intelligence (AI) bubble similar to the dot-com crash of the early 2000s. The bank is apprehensive about a potential surge in lending to data centers and its implications for the financial market, highlighting parallels to the past crisis. This heightened scrutiny indicates a cautious approach to prevent a similar economic downturn and protect against unsustainable speculative activities in the sector.

data.title: Harvard Ave Acquisition Corp closes $145M IPO of 14.5M units at $10 each on Nasdaq, trading under "HAVAU" symbol.
data.description: A New York-based company, Harvard Ave Acquisition Corporation (Nasdaq: HAVAU), recently concluded its initial public offering by selling 14,500,000 units at $10.00 per unit. This generated gross proceeds of $145 million, excluding underwriting discounts and estimated offering expenses. The units were officially listed on the Nasdaq Global Market and commenced trading under the ticker symbol “HAVAU” on October 23, 2025. Each unit comprises of one Class A ordinary share and one right to receive one-tenth of one Class A ordinary share. Following the separation of securities within the units, it is expected that the Class A ordinary shares will be listed as “HAVA” and the rights as “HAVAR” on the Nasdaq.

data.title: AT&T found in violation of NAD Procedures for U.S. advertising, specifies Section 2.1(I); communicated Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, the National Advertising Division of BBB National Programs found that AT&T Services, Inc. breached Section 2.1(I) of the National Advertising Division (NAD)/National Advertising Review Board (NARB) Procedures. The decision marks a significant development in the U.S. advertising industry's self-regulatory processes.

data.title: Miluna Acquisition Corp closed $60 million IPO with 6M units at $10 each on Nasdaq as "MMTXU" on Oct 23, 2025.
data.description: In Taipei, Taiwan, on October 24, 2025, Miluna Acquisition Corp (Nasdaq: MMTXU) revealed the successful completion of its initial public offering. The company closed the offering of 6,000,000 units priced at $10.00 each. These units are now publicly listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol “MMTXU” as of October 23, 2025. Each unit contains one ordinary share and one redeemable warrant. Following the separation of these securities, the ordinary shares and warrants will trade on Nasdaq as “MMTX” and “MMTXW” respectively.

data.title: Mustang Energy provides AGM update: Meeting on Nov. 14, 2025 at 10:00 am PST in Vancouver, BC. Meeting materials available online. Email or call for copies.
data.description: Vancouver, BC, Oct. 24, 2025 - Mustang Energy Corp. (CSE: MEC, OTC: MECPF, FRA: 92T) has released the Meeting Materials for its upcoming annual general and special Meeting scheduled for November 14, 2025, at Suite 2501 – 550 Burrard Street, Vancouver, BC, Canada at 10:00 am PST. Shareholders can access the documents on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca or on its website at https://www.mustangenergy.ca/about. Copies of the AGM Materials can be obtained by emailing teresa79@gmail.com or calling 604.428.7050.
Prenetics Global plans public offering.

data.title: Rumble collaborates with Tether to introduce Bitcoin tips for creators, set to roll out in December. #partnership #Bitcoin
data.description: Rumble, a popular video sharing platform, has announced a partnership with Tether to integrate Bitcoin tipping for content creators. This feature is set to be rolled out in the upcoming weeks, aiming to provide a new revenue stream for users. The collaboration is anticipated to go live by early to mid-December, offering an innovative way for creators to earn through digital currency. Joining forces with Tether signals Rumble's commitment to enhancing its platform and supporting its community of content makers, ensuring a seamless and rewarding experience for all involved.

data.title: AvionTEq had a successful NBAA-BACE 2025 showcasing FDT uQAR2w Wi-Fi QAR with exclusive offers at booth #3528.
data.description: In Los Angeles, AvionTEq, a leading supplier of aviation test equipment and avionics testing solutions, recently wrapped up its presence at the 2025 NBAA Business Aviation Convention & Exhibition (NBAA-BACE) from October 14 to 16 at the Las Vegas Convention Center, specifically in West Hall – Booth #3528. The event attracted numerous industry experts and AvionTEq's booth stood out with live product demonstrations, attractive promotions, and a special focus on one of their unique offerings.

data.title: Faircourt Asset Management Inc. announces monthly distribution for the Faircourt Fund (CBOE:FGX) on Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Faircourt Asset Management Inc., acting as the Manager of the Faircourt Fund (CBOE: FGX), announced a monthly distribution for shareholders of the Fund. The distribution will be payable to shareholders of record on a specified date. This announcement indicates the commitment of Faircourt Asset Management Inc. to provide regular returns to investors in the Faircourt Fund (CBOE: FGX).

data.title: CSC to hold hiring event for Super Bowl LX security staff on Nov 15 at Levi's Stadium in Santa Clara.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California on October 24, 2025, leading crowd management company Contemporary Services Corporation (CSC) has revealed plans for a significant recruitment drive. The company is seeking licensed security personnel for Super Bowl LX at Levi's Stadium. This hiring event aims to fill numerous positions for the event, solidifying CSC's status as a premier provider of event security and guest services.

data.title: VARON helps families during seasonal changes with respiratory wellness; vital for asthma and COPD sufferers.
data.description: In New York on October 24, 2025, with the arrival of cooler temperatures and fluctuating air quality, numerous households are experiencing shifts in their breathing patterns. Factors such as dry air, allergens, and abrupt cold spells have been observed to exacerbate conditions such as asthma or COPD, emphasizing the importance of prioritizing respiratory health during this season.
